Cramped Cavern@@3Ke7DhoAo0j8J7zF.name: Cramped Cavern
Cramped Cavern@@3Ke7DhoAo0j8J7zF.description: While they fight in this chamber, their immense size works a bit against them and they suffer a –1 circumstance penalty on all melee strikes.

Magic Pool's Curse@@NLtEU0GujzUVnka7.name: Magic Pool's Curse
Magic Pool's Curse@@NLtEU0GujzUVnka7.description:
@UUID[JournalEntry.pf2ap20003whistl.JournalEntryPage.03magicpool00000]{Magic Pool}

The character becomes cursed, and the dreams of being chased by monsters occur nightly. As long as the curse persists, the character suffers a –2 status penalty against sleep effects, and requires 10 hours of sleep each day rather than 8. This curse is permanent until it is removed (the curse is 5th level with a DC 20 to counteract).

Nualia’s Gratitude@@xOgdnlKm9hUfy0er.name: Nualia’s Gratitude
Nualia’s Gratitude@@xOgdnlKm9hUfy0er.description: Nualia’s thanks remain constant. Her gratitude grants you a permanent +1 circumstance bonus to all saving throws against emotion effects

Putrid Scent@@yo8bojNvBHBR6G3p.name: Putrid Scent
Putrid Scent@@yo8bojNvBHBR6G3p.description: The putrid scent in the room is remarkable. All saving throws against a ghast’s stench in this room suffer a –1 circumstance penalty.
